official_functions.role: Construct, write, decode, and observe the official Play clientbound set_player_team remove fixture
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns set_player_team to packet id 0x6d.
The remove fixture body is team name String followed by method byte 1.
The remove branch does not serialize team parameters or player list.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, team fields, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer add/change/join/leave bodies, team parameters, colors, visibility, collision, player membership, scoreboard lifecycle, or UI behavior.
